name: Corsair RM850x
description: The Corsair RM850x is a premium, fully modular 850-watt ATX power supply. Renowned for reliability and quiet operation, it features an 80 PLUS Gold certification, high-quality Japanese capacitors, and a Zero RPM fan mode that allows the 140mm fluid dynamic bearing fan to stop entirely at low loads for silence.

name: Seasonic Focus GX-750
description: A premium, fully modular 750-watt power supply designed for high-performance PC builds.Featuring an 80 PLUS Gold efficiency rating, 100% Japanese capacitors, and a 10-year manufacturer warranty, it guarantees exceptional stability, quiet operation, and long-term reliability for modern hardware.
